metadata.name: Invalid terminal command bypassing audit
metadata.description: This fixture must fail because the terminal command uses --no-audit, which disables session transcript audit. Terminal sessions with audit disabled cannot participate in workspace operation evidence chains.

steps.name: bad-terminal-no-audit
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops terminal-command run --operation-id op-bad-001 --session-id sess-bad-001 --command bash --no-audit --side-effects none
